note: First real baseline: 2026-07-07, claude-haiku-4-5-20251001, all 8 scenario×arm runs green in a root container (IS_SANDBOX=1 required for bypassPermissions as root — see SMOKE.md). Haiku 4.5 saturates all four scenarios in BOTH arms, so outcome scores no longer discriminate control vs sdlc at this model tier; the discriminating signal this run was cost (resumption: sdlc 6-10 turns / 51-78k tokens vs control 11-12 turns / 103-128k). Scenario hardening (state.md Next) is what will make scores discriminate again.
